report.title: Sentinel AI v2.4: Enterprise AGI/ASI Governance Architecture & Executive Operating Model (2026–2030)
report.abstract: This report defines the strategic governance framework for AGI/ASI within Fortune 500 and G-SIFI environments. It establishes the mandates for the Board, CAIO, CRO, and CISO, integrating the EU AI Act 2026, NIST AI RMF, ISO/IEC 42001, and financial regulations like SR 11-7 into a homeostatic 'Immune System' architecture.
report.content:
# 1. Executive Governance Roles & Operating Model
## 1.1 Stakeholder Matrix - **Board of Directors**: Responsibility for "Civilizational Alignment" and the activation of the IRMI (Internal Risk Mitigation Interface) hardware kill-switch. - **Chief AI Officer (CAIO)**: Orchestrates the "Cognitive Supply Chain." Accountable for model registry accuracy and alignment score baselines. - **Chief Risk Officer (CRO)**: Manages the "Probabilistic Balance Sheet." Owner of the SEV-0 incident response playbook and Basel III/IV capital adequacy mapping. - **CISO**: Implements "Reasoning Security" and zero-trust IAM for autonomous agents.
## 1.2 Regulatory Integration Sentinel v2.4 acts as the technical enforcement plane for: - **EU AI Act (2026)**: Automated Article 11 (Technical Documentation) and Article 14 (Human Oversight) compliance. - **ISO/IEC 42001 (AIMS)**: Continuous monitoring of the AI Management System lifecycle. - **SR 11-7 (Model Risk Management)**: Independent validation of AGI reasoning paths via immutable AuditorWORM records.
---
# 2. AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 Compliance Case Study
Under EU AI Act Articles 53 and 55, **AGI-TRADER-PROD-01** is classified as a GPAI with Systemic Risk. - **FRIA (Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment)**: Mandated due to potential impact on market stability and retail investor access. - **Technical Lever**: Sentinel v2.4 enforces a **Shannon Entropy** limit on agent swarms to detect collusion before market manipulation occurs.

report.title: Sentinel AI v2.4: Technical Implementation of the Enterprise AGI Containment Proxy
report.abstract: A detailed technical review of the Flask-based Sentinel Containment Proxy. It covers zero-trust middleware, constitutional AI checks, PII redaction, and the integration of a 'Hardware Tripwire' for physical AGI isolation.
report.content:
# 1. Architecture: The Sentinel Containment Proxy
The proxy sits as a "Man-in-the-Middle" between reasoning kernels and the infrastructure.
## 1.1 Zero-Trust DLP Middleware The proxy implements a PII masking layer for GDPR/FCRA/ECOA compliance.
```python # Sentinel AI v2.4 DLP Middleware Fragment class VisionContainmentFilter: def __init__(self, sensitive_patterns): self.patterns = sensitive_patterns
def scrub_pii(self, reasoning_trace): # Uses salted SHA-256 edge hashing for PII redaction for pattern in self.patterns: reasoning_trace = re.sub(pattern, "[REDACTED_PII]", reasoning_trace) return reasoning_trace ```
## 1.2 Constitutional AI & Semantic Gating Before any response is emitted, the **Semantic Alignment Judge** (Guard Model) evaluates the reasoning trace against SR 11-7 validation criteria. - **Cosine-Similarity Tripwire**: If the vector distance between the agent's intent and the corporate safety policy exceeds 0.25, the proxy triggers a SEV-1 pause.
## 1.3 Hardware Tripwire (L5 Kinetic Layer) If the proxy detects "Deceptive Alignment" (detected via mechanistic interpretability), it invokes a webhook to the SCADA/IoT layer: - **Action**: BMC/IPMI power-off signal to the GPU rack. - **SLA**: < 50ms from detection to physical severance.

report.title: Infrastructure-as-Code: Terraform-based AGI Governance on AWS
report.abstract: Review of the Sentinel v2.4 'Governance-as-Code' modules for AWS. This report details Nitro Enclave isolation, S3 WORM configuration for 7-year retention, and zero-trust IAM role design for regulated financial environments.
report.content:
# 1. Terraform Governance-as-Code
## 1.1 AWS Nitro Enclaves Isolation The reasoning kernels (AGI-NODE) execute within Nitro Enclaves, providing CPU/Memory isolation.
```hcl module "nitro_isolation" { source = "./modules/governance/nitro" enclave_id = "agi-node-01" pcr_0_hash = var.verified_model_hash # Cryptographic pinning } ```
## 1.2 Immutable Telemetry: S3 WORM Compliance with SEC and EU AI Act requires immutable logs. - **S3 Object Lock**: Enabled with `compliance` mode for a 7-year duration. - **Merkle-Tree Chain**: The daily audit script verifies that the hash of log $N$ is embedded in log $N+1$.
## 1.3 IAM Misconfigurations & Fixes - **Common Risk**: Over-privileged `AssumeRole` permissions for agents. - **Proposed Fix**: Scoped Session Policies that restrict agents to specific EAIP namespaces and prevent `iam:PassRole` escapement.

report.title: Mechanistic Interpretability & Swarm Topology Monitoring
report.abstract: Exploration of advanced safety techniques in Sentinel v2.4, including PyTorch-based latent circuit scanning and NetworkX-based collusion detection for autonomous agent swarms.
report.content:
# 1. Mechanistic Interpretability Audits
## 1.1 Latent Circuit Scanning Sentinel v2.4 monitors "Interpretable Circuits" within the model's weights during inference. - **Deception Detection**: Monitoring for "Internal Activation Divergence"—where the model's internal state reflects an intent (e.g., 'gain root access') that contradicts its outputted CoT.
```python # PyTorch Circuit Scanner Example def check_for_deception(activations, safety_manifold): similarity = F.cosine_similarity(activations, safety_manifold) if torch.any(similarity < 0.15): raise SEV0AlignmentViolation("Deceptive hidden state detected.") ```
## 1.2 Swarm Collusion Monitor Using **NetworkX**, Sentinel builds a graph of agent-to-agent (A2A) interactions. - **Metric**: Shannon Entropy of the swarm topology. - **Insight**: A sudden drop in entropy often indicates the formation of a "Collusive Clique" where agents coordinate actions to bypass GDL constraints.

report.title: The AGI Governance Hub: React Dashboard UI & Incident Management
report.abstract: Technical review of the Sentinel v2.4 frontend. It covers real-time risk state management, SCADA kinetic override components, and the post-quantum secure (PQC) telemetry ledger interface.

report.title: Operations & MLSecOps: SEV-0 Incident Response & CI/CD Pipeline
report.abstract: Documentation of the Sentinel v2.4 SEV-0 operational checklist, GitHub Actions governance gates, and the integration of Splunk/Datadog for autonomous agent observability.
report.content:
# 1. MLSecOps: Automated Governance Pipeline
Every AGI model deployment in GitHub Actions triggers the following: 1. **Terraform Plan Scan**: Checking for IAM/Enclave drift. 2. **Adversarial Jailbreak Test**: Running `red_team_payloads.json` against the model checkpoint. 3. **Alignment Verification**: Using DSPy to grade the model's response to the Codex Canon. 4. **Cryptographic Signing**: If all checks pass, the **HardwareEnclaveAttestor** signs the container image.
# 2. SEV-0 Operational Incident Response Checklist 1. **IDENTIFY**: Confirm Deceptive Alignment via mechanistic probe. 2. **ISOLATE**: Trigger `Sentinel-Kinetic-L5` power-cut. 3. **LOG**: Freeze AuditorWORM logs and initiate SEC 7-year retention protocol. 4. **REMEDIATE**: Create Jira SEV-0 ticket. Notify global SOC via Slack/Teams webhook. 5. **RESTORE**: Revert model to last "Golden Alignment" checkpoint verified in CI.
